$comment: This file is LEGACY — the current sync (apps/fetcher/src/sync.ts) uses hardcoded direct REST adapters for Ultrahuman, Polar, Withings, and Garmin-via-MCP. The credentials for each adapter are read from ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json (mcp.servers section). This file is kept for reference but is not read at runtime.

sources.name: mock
sources.note: Test-only MCP source. Only used when running apps/fetcher/test/mock-mcp-server.ts manually.
